spatial_reading: TRACE-BiOpt is not simply maximizing spatial spread: pairwise spacing shrinks slightly, but shortlist collapse weakens because always-selected nodes drop and unique support expands.
TRACE-BiOpt is spatially more distributed on the current-best low-budget row: both pairwise spacing and nearest-neighbor spacing increase over the strongest baseline.
